# Appaloft Docs

Appaloft is a backend-core deployment platform with CLI, HTTP API, Web console, and future MCP tool entrypoints.

Start here:
- /docs/ - Public documentation index
- /docs/start/first-deployment/ - First deployment path and mental model
- /docs/start/entrypoints/ - Web, CLI, HTTP API, and future MCP entrypoint selection
- /docs/deploy/sources/ - Deployment source inputs
- /docs/deploy/lifecycle/ - Deployment lifecycle: detect, plan, execute, verify, rollback
- /docs/deploy/previews/ - Pull request previews, cleanup workflow, and product-grade preview differences
- /docs/deploy/recovery/ - Relink, preview cleanup, retry, and rollback decisions
- /docs/resources/scheduled-tasks/ - Scheduled tasks, run history, and task logs
- /docs/observe/logs-health/ - Runtime logs and health summaries
- /docs/observe/diagnostics/ - Safe diagnostic summaries

Core references:
- /docs/resources/projects/ - User-facing project and resource concepts
- /docs/environments/variables/precedence/ - Environment variable precedence and snapshots
- /docs/access/domains/custom-domains/ - Custom domain binding
- /docs/reference/cli/ - CLI entrypoint reference
- /docs/reference/http-api/ - HTTP API reference
- /docs/reference/web-console/ - Web console guide

Internal implementation specs are not public user documentation. Prefer public task pages for user-facing answers.
